description: An event manager needs to process the final invoice and settlement for a completed trade show.

nodes.task_description: Gather all final charges for the event, including room rental, final catering bill, and any additional labor charges.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles all billable items for the event.

nodes.task_description: Generate the final invoice, applying the client's initial deposit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a final invoice showing the total cost minus the deposit paid.

nodes.task_description: Send the final invoice to the client for payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the invoice to the client's accounting department.

nodes.task_description: Once paid, close out the event in the booking system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent marks the event as 'Settled' and archives the record.
